ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "book_title" TEXT /* Title of the product (e.g., book title) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., '10x5x2 inches') */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product in pounds or kilograms */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the product */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* URLs of product images */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category, if applicable */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the category image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being reviewed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer leaving the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was left */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5 stars) */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpfulness" INTEGER /* Number of people who found the review helpful */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., 'website', 'mobile app') */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the customer's account */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review statistic */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the statistic belongs to */,
  "number_of_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  "mean_star_rating" TEXT /* Mean star rating for the product */,
  "sd_of_star_rating" TEXT /* Standard deviation of star ratings for the product */,
  "median_star_rating" TEXT /* Median star rating for the product */,
  "number_of_positive_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews with a rating of 4 or 5 stars */,
  "number_of_negative_reviews" INTEGER /* Number of reviews with a rating of 1 or 2 stars */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_statistics_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the order */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is shipped */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., 'pending', 'shipped', 'delivered') */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used (e.g., 'credit card', 'PayPal') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* ID of the order the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product in the order */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product in the order */,
  "discount" TEXT /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the inventory belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_point" INTEGER /* Quantity at which the product should be reordered */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the inventory was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the category belongs to */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the product belongs to */,
  "category_order" INTEGER /* Order in which the category is displayed for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_categories_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "product_review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review belongs to */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the product belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the review, to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer the recommendation belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product being recommended */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was made */,
  "recommendation_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., 'similar purchase history', 'favorite category') */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendations_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recommendation_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommendation the statistic belongs to */,
  "click_through_rate" TEXT /* Click-through rate for the recommendation */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate for the recommendation */,
  "total_views" INTEGER /* Total number of times the recommendation was viewed */,
  "total_clicks" INTEGER /* Total number of times the recommendation was clicked */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recommendation_statistics_recommendation_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommendation_id") REFERENCES recommendations ("recommendation_id")
)
